candidates.symptom: Phase 5 confirms 100% of critical joins (100.0%) using an offline trace sourced from the same appmap.db that produced Phase 4's CONFIRMED lineages. This is circular — Phase 5 is not providing independent evidence.
candidates.proposed_fix: Run Phase 5 in live mode (set adapters.replay_adapter in scope.yaml) to obtain an independent runtime trace. Until then, treat all Phase 5 confirmation as advisory.
